commands.desc: Detect code patterns that may indicate prohibited AI practices.
LLM security scan including manipulative/deceptive patterns.
Auto-derive STRIDE threat model for risk identification.
Quantify finding risk in dollar exposure.

EU-AI-Art.10.1.title: Data governance — datasets subject to governance

commands.desc: Generate AI-BOM documenting data sources and governance.

EU-AI-Art.10.2.title: Data governance — design, collection, labelling, bias

commands.desc: Scan for bias and fairness issues in LLM-calling code.

EU-AI-Art.10.3.title: Dataset representativeness
EU-AI-Art.10.3.note: Requires statistical analysis of dataset composition — organizational data science responsibility.

EU-AI-Art.10.5.title: Special category data for bias monitoring
EU-AI-Art.10.5.note: Requires legal basis (GDPR Art. 9) for processing special category data.

EU-AI-Art.10.legal.title: Lawful data collection
EU-AI-Art.10.legal.note: Requires legal review of training data rights, GDPR consent basis, and copyright compliance. Counsel owns this.

commands.desc: Generate AI-BOM with model cards and system documentation.

EU-AI-Art.11.annex4.title: Annex IV completeness
EU-AI-Art.11.annex4.note: Requires review against Annex IV checklist — system description, intended purpose, design specs, training methodology, validation, performance metrics.

commands.desc: Verify logging and audit trail presence in the application.
Check logging configuration in deployment.
Generate transparency disclosures about AI use.
Audit agent/MCP tool permissions for human oversight gaps.

EU-AI-Art.14.2.title: Risk prevention via oversight
EU-AI-Art.14.2.note: Requires documented human oversight procedures for risk mitigation.

EU-AI-Art.14.4.title: Operator competence and training
EU-AI-Art.14.4.note: Requires documented training program for human overseers including automation bias awareness.

EU-AI-Art.14.bias.title: Automation bias awareness
EU-AI-Art.14.bias.note: Requires training materials on automation bias for human oversight operators.

commands.desc: Full security scan for cybersecurity baseline.
Apply security hardening.

EU-AI-Art.15.2.title: Accuracy metrics declaration
EU-AI-Art.15.2.note: Requires documented accuracy levels in instructions of use.

commands.desc: Active red-team adversarial testing (if endpoint available).
Build PoCs to validate robustness.
Generate disaster recovery and failover playbook.
Full SAST + SCA + secrets scan.
Apply all fixes.
Security hardening.
Audit deployment infrastructure security.
Dependency patching and vulnerability audit.

EU-AI-Art.17.title: Quality management system
EU-AI-Art.17.note: QMS requires organizational policies, procedures, accountability structures, internal audits, and corrective action processes. Beyond code-scan scope.

EU-AI-Art.43.title: Conformity assessment
EU-AI-Art.43.note: Conformity assessment (internal or Notified Body) is a formal procedure before market placement. Requires legal/regulatory process.

EU-AI-Art.49.title: EU database registration
EU-AI-Art.49.note: Administrative requirement to register in the EU AI database before deployment.

EU-AI-Art.51.title: GPAI classification
EU-AI-Art.51.note: Requires legal determination of GPAI model classification.

commands.desc: Generate AI-BOM as foundation for GPAI documentation.

EU-AI-Art.53.1b.title: Downstream provider documentation
EU-AI-Art.53.1b.note: Requires integration guides and model capability/limitation documentation for downstream users.

EU-AI-Art.53.1c.title: Copyright compliance policy
EU-AI-Art.53.1c.note: Requires legal review of training data copyright compliance. Counsel owns this.

EU-AI-Art.53.1d.title: Training data summary
EU-AI-Art.53.1d.note: Requires sufficiently detailed published summary of training data content.

commands.desc: LLM security evaluation.
Adversarial testing and PoC generation.
Generate incident tracking and reporting playbook.
Full security scan.
Apply cybersecurity hardening.

EU-AI-Art.55.4.title: Energy and compute tracking
EU-AI-Art.55.4.note: Requires energy consumption and compute usage tracking tools (codecarbon, carbontracker).

commands.desc: Enable rolling trend tracking for post-deployment monitoring.
Set up daily CVE alerts for ongoing vulnerability monitoring.
